---
title: "Robotic Systems Laboratory"
subtitle: "Course website"
---

## Syllabus

This course introduces core topics in robotic systems, starting from software
architecture and simulation, then moving through robot modeling, planning, and
control, and finally covering sensing and perception for integrated
robotic autonomy.

### Lecture Schedule

| Date | Week | Lecture |
|---|---|---|
| TBD | Week 1 | [Lecture 01: Physics Simulation](notes/01-physics-simulation.qmd) |
| TBD | Week 2 | [Lecture 02: LCM Communication](notes/02-lcm-based-communication-and-control.qmd) |
| TBD | Week 3 | [Lecture 03: Gravity Compensation](notes/03-gravity-compensation.qmd) |
| TBD | Week 4 | [Lecture 04: Robot Collision Geometry Modeling](notes/04-robot-collision-geometry-modeling.qmd) |
| TBD | Week 5 | [Lecture 05: Artificial Potential Fields](notes/05-artificial-potential-fields.qmd) |
| TBD | Week 6 | [Lecture 06: Motion Planning and Trajectory Tracking](notes/06-motion-planning-and-trajectory-tracking.qmd) |
| TBD | Week 7 | [Lecture 07: Operational Space Impedance Control](notes/07-operational-space-impedance-control.qmd) |
| TBD | Week 8 | [Lecture 08: Velocity Field Control](notes/08-velocity-field-control.qmd) |
| TBD | Week 9 | [Lecture 09: Camera Calibration](notes/09-camera-calibration.qmd) |
| TBD | Week 10 | [Lecture 10: Signed Distance Field Construction](notes/10-signed-distance-field-construction.qmd) |
| TBD | Week 11 | [Lecture 11: Visual Servoing](notes/11-visual-servoing.qmd) |
| TBD | Week 12 | [Lecture 12: Robotic Grasping](notes/12-robotic-grasping.qmd) |
| TBD | Week 13~16 | [Final Projects](notes/final-projects.qmd) |

Full notes index: [Lecture Notes](notes/index.qmd).
